title: ODS Template Schema
description: Defines the structure for an ODS template. A template combines a short question wizard with a JSON-e template body that renders into a valid ODS application spec. Frameworks that support the full JSON-e spec can process the template section directly; frameworks with partial support implement the $if/$map/${} subset.

templateName.description: The display name of the template shown in the Quick Build catalog.

description.description: A short description of what kind of app this template builds.

icon.description: Optional. A Material icon name to display alongside the template in the catalog.

questions.description: An ordered array of questions to ask the user before rendering the template. Answers become the JSON-e context for the template body. Keep this short — if you need more than ~5 questions, the app is better built with the AI helper.

template.description: A JSON-e template that, when rendered with the question answers as context, produces a valid ODS application spec. Must conform to ods-schema.json after rendering. Frameworks may implement a subset of JSON-e ($if, $map, ${} interpolation) — templates should prefer these operators for maximum portability.

question.title: Template Question
question.description: A single question in the Quick Build wizard. The answer is stored under the question's 'id' in the JSON-e rendering context.

id.description: The variable name used to reference this answer in the template body. Must be a valid JSON-e identifier (letters, digits, underscores).

label.description: The question text shown to the user.

type.description: The input type for the question. 'text' = free text, 'select' = dropdown, 'checkbox' = boolean toggle, 'field-list' = a mini builder for defining fields (name + type), 'field-ref' = dropdown populated from a field-list answer (use 'ref' to specify which).

required.description: When true, the user must answer before proceeding. Defaults to false.

placeholder.description: Optional hint text for text inputs.

options.description: Required when type is 'select'. The list of choices.

default.description: Optional default value. For checkbox, use true/false.

ref.description: For 'field-ref' type only. The 'id' of a 'field-list' question whose fields become the dropdown options. The answer is stored as the selected field's programmatic name.

presets.description: Optional. For 'field-list' type only. Pre-defined field templates the user can add with one tap instead of typing. Each preset expands to a field with a sensible name, label, and type.

fieldPreset.title: Field Preset
fieldPreset.description: A pre-defined field template for the field-list question type. Lets users add common fields with one tap.

label.description: The display name shown on the preset button and used as the field label.

name.description: The programmatic field name (column name in storage).

options.description: For select presets, the default option values.
